description_long: This object is a medium-sized potted plant featuring a cluster of upright, slender brown stems emerging from a simple, cylindrical pot. The pot is a muted brown color, likely made of terracotta or a similar material, and has a slightly flared rim. The plant itself has broad, oval-shaped green leaves with a smooth texture, arranged in a radial pattern around the stems, giving it a lush and healthy appearance. The leaves are a deep green with some variation in shading, and they are spaced to allow light to pass through, creating a natural, airy look. There are no visible decorative elements or patterns on the pot, and the plant does not have any flowers or fruit. The overall design suggests it is intended for placement on the floor in an urban indoor or semi-outdoor setting.
description: A medium-sized potted plant with broad green leaves and multiple slender brown stems in a plain brown cylindrical pot. The plant has a lush, natural appearance and is likely intended for floor placement.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full spread of green leaves and the open arrangement of stems in a plain brown pot.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the dense clustering of leaves and the cylindrical shape of the pot.
description_view_2: Rear view with a clear view of the stems and the radial arrangement of the leaves.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the overlapping leaves and the pot's simple, unadorned surface.
